hero.text: Today is a day to embrace change.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Exude confidence, and trust your instincts today.
aries.love: Passion ignites—be open to new romantic possibilities.
aries.career: Take the lead on projects and showcase your talents.

taurus.general: Stability is your ally; focus on long-term goals.
taurus.love: Communication is key in your relationships today.
taurus.career: Seek collaboration; teamwork will yield positive results.

gemini.general: Social interactions will be beneficial; connect with friends.
gemini.love: A spontaneous outing could spark romance.
gemini.career: Flexibility in your plans will open new doors.

cancer.general: Trust your intuition; it will guide you wisely.
cancer.love: Be vulnerable with your partner; it deepens bonds.
cancer.career: Share your ideas confidently; they are worth hearing.

leo.general: Radiate positivity and let others see your true colors.
leo.love: A heartfelt gesture can reignite the flame of love.
leo.career: Your creativity will shine through; embrace it.

virgo.general: Focus on details, as they will play a vital role today.
virgo.love: Small acts of kindness will strengthen your relationships.
virgo.career: Organize your tasks to elevate your productivity.

libra.general: Seek balance in your life; harmony is essential.
libra.love: A meaningful conversation can clarify your feelings.
libra.career: Collaborate with others to streamline efforts.

scorpio.general: Introspection will empower personal growth today.
scorpio.love: Embrace vulnerability to deepen trust with your partner.
scorpio.career: You may face challenges; navigate them with resilience.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons—step outside your comfort zone.
sagittarius.love: Sharing experiences can strengthen your bond.
sagittarius.career: Pursue opportunities with an adventurous spirit.

capricorn.general: Hard work will pay off; stay focused on your goals.
capricorn.love: Loyalty is key in your relationships today.
capricorn.career: Your efforts will be recognized, so keep pushing forward.

aquarius.general: Embrace your individuality; it sets you apart.
aquarius.love: A shared vision can enhance your romantic connection.
aquarius.career: Innovative ideas will lead to success; think outside the box.

pisces.general: Creativity flows; let your imagination guide you.
pisces.love: Stay open to unexpected romantic encounters.

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
professional.author: Roy T. Bennett

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Your time is limited, so don’t waste it living someone else’s life.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
motivation.author: Walt Disney

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

captions.text: Life is about making an impact, not making an income.
captions.author: Kevin Kruse

captions.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
captions.author: Peter Drucker

captions.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
captions.author: Lewis Carroll

captions.text: Dream as if you’ll live forever; live as if you’ll die today.
captions.author: James Dean

captions.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
captions.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
captions.author: Roy T. Bennett

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: The real opportunity for success lies within the person and not in the job.
tech.author: Zig Ziglar

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out of it alive.
fun.author: Elbert Hubbard

fun.text: I intend to live forever. So far, so good.
fun.author: Steven Wright

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack in will.
fun.author: Vince Lombardi

fun.text: We don't stop playing because we grow old; we grow old because we stop playing.
fun.author: George Bernard Shaw

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Hope is being able to see that there is light despite all of the darkness.
faith.author: Desmond Tutu

faith.text: It is not faith that weighs an ounce of the heart.
faith.author: Victor Hugo

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Everything you need is already inside you; you just have to believe in yourself.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only limit to your impact is your imagination and commitment.
wisdom.author: Tony Robbins

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: J. R. R. Tolkien

wisdom.text: To acquire knowledge, one must study; but to acquire wisdom, one must observe.
wisdom.author: Marilyn vos Savant
